title: ROOT Stock: A 586% Rally in 2024 – What's Behind the Surge?
text: Root Insurance (NASDAQ: ROOT) experienced a remarkable 586% stock surge in 2024. The article highlights several factors driving this performance. The company reported adjusted earnings of $1.42 per share in Q4 2024, reversing the prior year's $1.60 loss. Revenue increased 68% to $327 million, surpassing analyst expectations. Policies in force grew 21% year-over-year to over 414,000. Root disrupts traditional auto insurance through its mobile app-based model that tracks driving behaviors and adjusts policy rates accordingly. The company maintains a gross combined ratio of 95% and gross loss ratio of 59%, indicating strong underwriting performance. Management successfully reduced its run rate interest expense by more than 50%, enhancing operational efficiency. CEO Alex Trimm expressed optimism about growth opportunities through partnerships and state expansion. While analysts expect a 41-cent per share loss for 2025, projections suggest recovery to $1.10 per share earnings by 2026. The article emphasizes this is not investment advice and readers should conduct their own research before making financial decisions.
